overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along a wet residential street in Los Santos. The camera follows the sidewalk past palm trees and streetlights, encountering light traffic including a black sedan and SUV at an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street corner with palm tree landscaping

events.description: black sedan drives past on the wet street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the curb, moving away from the street corner

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street, passing by the camera's position

entered.detail: wet road surface reflecting yellow streetlight glow
row of palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
low brick wall with raised landscaping behind it
tall street lamp casting warm yellow light
house with illuminated windows visible behind perimeter wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a residential street corner at night in GTA V. The camera walks along a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing a brick retaining wall on the left. A black sedan drives past on the street, its headlights cutting through the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with privacy walls and hedges

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk past residential properties with tall privacy walls

entered.detail: tall beige concrete wall with dark trim running along the property line
dense green hedge on top of the concrete wall
narrow strip of grass between the sidewalk and the street curb

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the residential sidewalk, now passing tall concrete privacy walls topped with hedges on the left. The palm trees that were on the left now appear on the right as the path curves. The wet pavement continues to reflect the streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with traffic control signals

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green
black SUV enters the intersection from the left side

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the street intersection, pausing to observe traffic signals

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: traffic light fixture showing green signal
painted white crosswalk lines on the wet asphalt
dark colored sport utility vehicle moving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a street intersection, leaving the residential sidewalk behind. The traffic signal visible on the right changes from red to green. A black SUV enters the intersection from the left as the camera moves into the crosswalk area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wet residential street at night that gradually transitions from a quiet sidewalk walk to a busy urban intersection. It begins at a street corner, moving past a brick retaining wall and palm trees as a black sedan drives by with headlights cutting through the darkness. As the camera continues forward, the scenery shifts to tall concrete privacy walls topped with hedges, while the palm trees migrate to the right side of the path as the sidewalk curves. The scene then opens up toward a street intersection, where the wet pavement reflects the glow of the streetlights. Finally, the camera enters the crosswalk area just as a traffic signal turns green and a black SUV pulls into the intersection from the left.
